cases.mutation: Uses the required timer form but alpha is 0.002 instead of 0.025, so late settling is far too slow.
Updates y directly to V(vin) on every timer event, making the DUT effectively a delayed passthrough instead of a first-order lowpass.
Filters 0.9 - V(vin), causing the step response direction and final value to be wrong.
Implements the correct recurrence until y exceeds 0.35 V, then clips the state and misses the expected late level.
Keeps y at 0.0 on every timer event while preserving the interface and output transition call.
